player.description: Player spaceship top-down view, sleek futuristic fighter, cyan-blue glowing engines, metallic hull with panel lines, missile pods, AAA quality

enemy.description: Alien enemy fighter top-down view, insectoid design, red bioluminescent patterns, dark chitinous hull, AAA quality

boss.description: Massive alien boss battleship top-down view, purple-black hull, toxic green energy cannons, organic mechanical hybrid, skull-like design

stardust.description: Golden stardust collectible star-shaped crystal gem with sparkle glow effects, precious space mineral

crystal.description: Blue energy crystal collectible power-up item

token.description: Star Blaster Token SBT coin icon for CrossRamp

playerBullet.description: Player laser bullet - vertical elongated cyan-blue plasma energy bolt with neon glow trails pointing upward

enemyBullet.description: Enemy alien plasma projectile - glowing orange-red plasma orb with crackling electric sparks

space.description: Deep space nebula background for vertical scrolling shooter
